nodes.name: kotlin-test.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /kotlin-test slash command implementing a full Kotlin TDD cycle with Kotest, covering StringSpec, BehaviorSpec, data-driven, and coroutine test patterns alongside coverage targets and best practices.

nodes.name: learn-eval.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /learn-eval command that extracts insights from a completed session, evaluates their quality, and selectively persists only high-value learnings with a structured 5-step process including a scoring rubric.

nodes.name: learn.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /learn command that extracts reusable patterns, conventions, and techniques from the current session and saves them for future re-use, specifying output format and extraction criteria.

nodes.name: loop-start.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /loop-start command for initiating a multi-step agentic loop, specifying the startup flow, required safety checks, and supported arguments.

nodes.name: loop-status.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /loop-status command for querying the current state of a running agentic loop, including cross-session CLI output, watch mode, and snapshot file references.

nodes.name: marketing-campaign.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /marketing-campaign command for generating full marketing campaigns or single deliverables, with modes for full campaign, single deliverable, and copy review, plus agent delegation support.

nodes.name: model-route.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /model-route command that applies a routing heuristic to select the optimal AI model for a given task based on task characteristics.

nodes.name: multi-backend.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /multi-backend command for backend-focused development using multi-model collaboration, specifying the 6-phase workflow (research through quality review) and multi-model call specifications.

nodes.name: multi-execute.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /multi-execute command for multi-model collaborative code execution, routing frontend tasks to Gemini, backend to Codex, and fullstack to parallel calls, with a 5-phase workflow culminating in automatic audit and delivery.

nodes.name: multi-frontend.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /multi-frontend command for frontend-focused development using multi-model collaboration, specifying the same 6-phase workflow as multi-backend but scoped to UI, styles, and frontend logic.

nodes.name: multi-plan.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /multi-plan command for multi-model collaborative planning, orchestrating prompt enhancement, context retrieval, cross-validation, and dual-model plan drafting before delivering a final Claude implementation plan.

nodes.name: multi-workflow.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /multi-workflow command as the general-purpose multi-model collaborative development entry point, combining research, ideation, planning, implementation, optimization, and quality review phases.

nodes.name: orch-add-feature.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /orch-add-feature command that delegates a new feature addition task to an orchestrator agent, specifying usage and expected behavior.

nodes.name: orch-build-mvp.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /orch-build-mvp command that delegates building an MVP to an orchestrator agent, scoping the task to a minimal viable product.

nodes.name: orch-change-feature.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /orch-change-feature command that delegates a feature modification task to an orchestrator agent.

nodes.name: orch-fix-defect.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /orch-fix-defect command that delegates defect investigation and fixing to an orchestrator agent.

nodes.name: orch-refine-code.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /orch-refine-code command that delegates code quality refinement and cleanup to an orchestrator agent.

nodes.name: plan-prd.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /plan-prd command implementing a 4-phase PRD generation workflow (Frame, Ground, Decide, Generate), producing a structured Product Requirements Document with template and handoff instructions.

nodes.name: plan.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /plan command that converts an idea or PRD into a structured implementation plan grounded in learned patterns, with optional planner agent delegation and PRD artifact output.

nodes.name: pm2.md
nodes.summary: Defines the /pm2 command that initializes PM2 process manager configuration for a multi-service project, auto-detecting services and generating ecosystem.config.cjs, wrapper scripts, and per-service command files with Windows-specific PowerShell support.
